legend_symbols.means: Double General Purpose Outlet (AB=above bench, UB=under bench, SK=skirting)
GPO Single General Purpose Outlet (fit for purpose as noted)
Data CAT6 (fit for purpose as noted)
Speakers – wall mount, black or white finish, qty 4x
General LED Panels (surface mounted or suspended)
Feature Recessed LED Downlight – Aurora Triline ~Ø93mm IP44, 4000K
Existing and/or new exit signs (C.A.S.) – to BCA requirements
Feature Recessed LED Downlight in mirrors – Aurora Triline IP44
Switch with dimmer if noted (fit for purpose as noted)
Fans – wall mounted, industrial/commercial, Ø914mm, 970mm blade

items.note: Includes AB (above bench), UB (under bench) and SK (skirting) variants across BOH, kitchenette, male/female amenities, gym floor, and reception. Dense annotation in reception zone makes exact split difficult; 2x Dual DGPO+USB at reception desk counted as 2 DGPO units per the plan note.
Single GPO symbols visible on north gym wall, east gym wall, and near gang-fan switch area. Some may be obscured by annotation.

One in BOH/comms cupboard, one at reception desk (main data point to modem), one near LCD display. Legend note also references additional CAT6 cabling for speakers wired back to reception – not counted as separate data outlets.
Legend explicitly states qty 4x; four speaker positions confirmed on plan (two on north wall gym zone, two near entry/shopfront zone).
Includes 3x gang lights switches (zones 1–3), 2x gang fans switch (fans 1+2 and 3+4), plus individual light switch at kitchenette/amenities entry. Some switch symbols are on RCP sheet 103 only.

items.type: Feature Recessed LED Downlight (IP44, Aurora Triline ~Ø93mm)
items.note: Counted from RCP sheet 103 across main gym floor and change/amenity corridors. Symbol density in gym floor is high and PDF resolution limits precise count; range likely 16–20.
2 in male shower/change, 2 in female shower/change. RCP note states '2x fittings to be IP65 rated' per amenities compartment.
Located in BOH storage, kitchenette, and amenities corridor areas on RCP sheet 103.
One at main entry zone, one at rear/secondary exit. RCP note states 'exit sign only if required by certifier' for some locations.
Labelled Fan 1, Fan 2, Fan 3, Fan 4 on RCP sheet 103. Switched in two pairs (fans 1+2 and fans 3+4) per switch note.
Two camera positions visible on RCP sheet 103 – one covering entry/reception, one covering main gym floor.
Labelled 'FOUNTAIN POWER' in amenities/void area on sheet 104. Separate circuit implied.
Labelled at bottom of sheet 104 with note 'allow for timer in DB'.

items.symbol: POWER FOR LED NEON SIGN label
items.note: Labelled on north/top wall of main gym on sheet 104.
Existing EDB shown in BOH/storage area top-left on sheets 103 and 104 with note 'upgrade as required'. No new DB shown separately.
Mechanical item on RCP sheet 103; counted approximately 8 diffusers across main gym and amenities. Exact count limited by PDF resolution.
Located in amenities/shower areas on RCP sheet 103. Count approximate.

overall_note: Primary electrical sheets used are 103 (RCP inc. Lighting) and 104 (Electrical Plan inc. Power & Data). PDF resolution at 1/50 scale on A2 sheets causes symbol crowding, particularly in the main gym floor downlight grid and the reception desk annotation cluster, reducing confidence on those counts. No separate DB/switchboard schedule sheet was included in the set. Speakers are confirmed at qty 4 by legend text. All dedicated/appliance circuits are identified by text labels rather than a distinct symbol. The RCP and power plan should be cross-referenced on site as some switch and outlet positions are only annotated on one sheet.
